s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 ROOM LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the lens cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws <A> as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws <B> and remove the No. 1 room light assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SPOT LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws labeled A and 2 claws labeled B from the vehicle body.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws labeled C and remove the spot light assembly from the headlining.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Pull the light bulb holder in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration to detach the claw. Then remove the spot light assembly from the light bulb holder.
